title: Manufacturing Engineer - Indian Oil Corporation Digital Technologies - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Indian Oil Corporation Digital Technologies - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Manufacturing Engineer with drive and ambition, Indian Oil Corporation Digital Technologies in Bhopal is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Indian Oil Corporation Digital Technologies:
Indian Oil Corporation Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Indian Oil Corporation Digital Technologies!
